zh.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Plumpton於1404年10月7日出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，他的父親William Plumpton4歲，母親Alice Foljambe18歲。他於1416年1月20日與Elizabeth Stapleton在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1453年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾被列為high sheriff。他去世於1480年10月15日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯波福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Plumpton于1404年10月7日出生在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯时，他的父亲William Plumpton4岁，母亲Alice Foljambe18岁。他于1416年1月20日与Elizabeth Stapleton在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1453年在英国英格兰德比夏爾被列为high sheriff。他去世于1480年10月15日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯波福斯。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Plumpton was born on 7 October 1404, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Plumpton, was 4 and his mother, Alice Foljambe, was 18. He married Elizabeth Stapleton on 20 January 1416, in Carleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. In 1453, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 15 October 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Plumpton est né le 7 octobre 1404, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Plumpton, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Alice Foljambe, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stapleton le 20 janvier 1416, à Carleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. En 1453, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Plumpton am 7. Oktober 1404 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Plumpton 4 und seine Mutter Alice Foljambe 18. Er hat am 20. Januar 1416 in Carleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1453, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1480 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Plumpton è nato il il 7 ottobre 1404 nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Plumpton, aveva 4 anni e il suo madre, Alice Foljambe, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stapleton il 20 gennaio 1416, nel Carleton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1453, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 ottobre 1480, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Spofforth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Plumptonが1404年10月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースで生まれた時，父William Plumptonは4歳，母Alice Foljambeは18歳であった。1416年1月20日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカーレトンでElizabeth Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1453年，49歳の時，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1480年10月15日に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスプオフォースにて埋葬された。

ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사

ko.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Plumpton(이)가 1404년 10월 7일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Plumpton(은)는 4세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Foljambe(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1416년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 칼턴에서 Elizabeth Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1453년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1480년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에 묻혔다.

pt.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Plumpton nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1404, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Plumpton, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Alice Foljambe, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stapleton em 20 de janeiro de 1416, em Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1453, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Plumpton родился 7 октября 1404 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Plumpton было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Foljambe, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stapleton 20 января 1416 г. в местности карлетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. В 1453 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 15 октября 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Plumpton nació el 7 de octubre de 1404, en Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Plumpton, tenía 4 años y su mamá, Alice Foljambe, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stapleton el 20 de enero de 1416, en Carleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1453, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1480, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
